visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit room. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a light-colored collared shirt. A pair of black headphones rests around his neck. He stares intently at something off-screen with a serious and focused expression. The background is dark and out of focus, with the horizontal lines of window blinds visible on the right. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a white, stylized font. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's concentrated gaze. A man speaks in a calm, focused, and determined tone, as if he's working on a complex task. His voice is steady and assured as he states, "出发去，就267个电话在用。" The shot cuts to a slightly different angle of the same man. He continues to look down, his expression unchanged, as if analyzing data on a computer screen just out of frame. The headphones are still around his neck. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera is static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face. The camera angle shifts again, now showing the man from a lower perspective.
